name: SaaSSubscription
description: Structure of a SaaS application subscription record in the Sastrify platform

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the subscription in Sastrify

fields.name: applicationName
fields.description: Name of the SaaS application (e.g., Slack, Salesforce, Zoom)

fields.name: vendorName
fields.description: Legal name of the vendor / publisher

fields.name: category
fields.description: Functional category (CRM, Communication, Project Management, etc.)

fields.name: annualCost
fields.description: Total annual spend for this subscription in contract currency

fields.name: activeUsers
fields.description: Users active in the last 30 days

fields.name: utilizationRate
fields.description: Active users as percentage of total licenses (0-100)

fields.name: contractStartDate
fields.description: Start date of the current contract term

fields.name: paymentTerms
fields.description: Payment schedule: Annual Prepaid, Monthly, Quarterly, Multi-Year

fields.name: autoRenew
fields.description: Whether the contract auto-renews at expiration

fields.name: contractOwner
fields.description: Internal owner responsible for the subscription

fields.name: department
fields.description: Primary business department using this tool

fields.name: benchmarkData
fields.description: Market pricing benchmark data from Sastrify's intelligence engine

fields.name: discoverySource
fields.description: How the tool was discovered: SSO Integration, Accounting Integration, Browser Extension, Manual Entry

fields.name: status
fields.description: Subscription status: Active, Pending Renewal, Cancelled, Under Review, In Negotiation
